data.body: S3 close FAILED: cooldown test was sequential, AC demands concurrent (asyncio.gather) to race the Lock. Verified impl yields exactly-1 under 8 concurrent requests; fixed test to gather. Amended S3 (3722edbed) + rebased S4 (68c8bad02), re-pushed 717 ps3 + 721 ps2. Also added CI-evidence comments to S2/S3 for make-pass criterion.
